easter-simnel-cake.name: Easter Simnel Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Grease and flour a deep 8-inch springform pan. Line the bottom and sides of the pan with greased parchment paper.

Beat butter and brown sugar together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in 4 eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Mix in flour. Stir in golden raisins, currants, candied cherries, mixed fruit, lemon zest, and mixed spice until incorporated. Pour 1/2 of the batter into the prepared pan.
Divide almond paste into 3 equal portions. Roll out 1 portion into an 8-inch circle. Place over batter in the pan. Cover with remaining cake batter.

Bake in the preheated oven until evenly brown and firm to the touch, 2 hours 30 minutes. If cake is browning too quickly, cover with aluminum foil after 1 hour of baking. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn cake out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
Set the oven's broiler to high.
Place apricot jam in a small microwave-safe bowl and heat in the microwave until warm, about 5 seconds. Brush the top of cooled cake with warm jam.

Roll out another portion of almond paste into an 8-inch circle and place on top of cake. Brush the top with beaten egg. Divide remaining portion of almond paste into 11 pieces, roll into balls, and arrange around the outside edge of the top of cake. Brush the tops of balls lightly with beaten egg.
Place cake under the preheated broiler until almond paste is golden brown, 8 to 10 minutes.

egg-salad-with-dill.name: Egg Salad With Dill
instructions: Cut hard-boiled eggs in half, removing egg yolks from egg whites.

Combine egg yolks, mayonnaise, cream cheese, parsley, chives, dill, mustard, paprika, and salt in a food processor. Blend until creamy and mixed well together, adding more mayonnaise if consistency is too thick.
Coarsely chop egg whites and place in a medium bowl, add egg-herb mixture, and mix with a spoon.

eggplant-purees-argiro.name: Eggplant Purees
instructions: Wash the eggs and walk them.
Bake them in a strong ocean at 25°3′ for 25′-30′′ until their skin softens and darkens.
After they cool a little bit, cut and remove their flush with a spoon in a bowl.
Melt it with a fork or a mixer.
Cut the onion in half.
On one piece, stick the cages and place it in a pot with the milk to heat.
Fine chop the rest of the onions.
Sauté the butter in a saucepan and sauté the onion 5 minutes to Wilt.
Sprinkle with flour, stringing with wire, and baking 2–3–1.
Remove from the heat and a little, Always starring, add the warm milk.
Add the cream to the heat, salt and pepper and let it bind for 5'-6'.
After it binds, we withdraw it and add the eggs. Mix well.
Serve the eggplant chewed potatoes with a reddish calf.

eggplants-in-the-pot-argiro.name: Eggplants In The Pot
instructions: Clean the potatoes and after washing them, cut them into nick pieces.
Heat half the olive oil in a large pot and sauté the chopped onion for a few minutes until it becomes transparent.
Add the garlic, paste and potatoes.
Let them simmer for a few minutes and oil well.
Add the chopped tomatoes and fill in water as much as cover the injectors.
Add salt and pepper.
Cover with lid and simmer for about 35 minutes until the potatoes soften.
Preheat the evening to 200°C in the air.
Cut the eggs into nick pieces.
Add them to a baking pan and sprinkle them with minimal olive oil.
Bake them in a strong ocean for 15 minutes to burn.
When the potatoes are half soft, add the baked eggs and the remaining olive oil to the pot.
Simmer for an extra 15′.
Finally sprinkle with parsley.
Food should stay alone with its oil.
We don't mix it because the materials melt.
It is carefully served with fresh cheese and is wonderful!

elegant-veggie-ramen.name: Elegant Veggie Ramen
instructions: Soft-boil four eggs and place in an ice bath until ready to use.
In a separate pan, sauté bell peppers on medium heat in olive oil and season with garlic, salt, and pepper to taste. Set aside.
Next, sauté mushrooms on medium heat in olive oil for 5 minutes, or until soft. Season the same and set aside.
Boil 4 packages of ramen in water (without included seasoning) and drain. Top with teriyaki sauce and mix.
Separate noodles into 4 bowls and top with reserved bell peppers, mushrooms, halved, soft-boiled eggs and green onions.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

elote-mexican-grilled-corn.name: Elote (mexican Grilled Corn)
instructions: Build a medium-hot fire in a charcoal grill or heat a gas grill to high. Brush grill grate with oil. Combine chile powder and cayenne in a small bowl.

Grill corn, turning occasionally with tongs, until cooked through and lightly charred, about 10 minutes. Remove from grill and immediately brush each ear with 1½ tsp. mayonnaise. Sprinkle each with 1 Tbsp. cheese and a pinch of chile powder mixture. Squeeze 1 lime wedge over each ear and serve.

endives-with-roquefort-and-walnuts-peque.name: Endives With Roquefort And Walnuts

ingredients.item: 100 g de queso roquefort u otro queso azul
50 g de nueces peladas y troceadas
2-3 tablespoons of milk cream or liquid cream
1 cucharadita de miel (opcional, para los que disfrutan del contraste dulce)

instructions: Wash them well and have them carefully. Separate the leaves and serve as a basis for the mixture of ingredients. Be sure you don't break up to maintain his "beret" form.
In a bowl, scattering the Roquefort cheese and pounding with milk or cream cream. If you like sweet touch, add a teaspoon of honey. Fits with salt and pepper to taste.

Put a tablespoon of the Roquefort mixture onto every envil leaf. Then sprinkle his nuts cut above to give that crispy touch. If you prefer, you can add some drops of honey or balsamic vinegar above for a more intense taste

english-cake-with-ricotta-and-raspberry-.name: English Cake With Ricotta And Raspberry Jam
english-cake-with-ricotta-and-raspberry-.original_name: Bolo inglês com ricota e compota de framboesa
instructions: In a bowl, beat the ricotta cheese with sugar until you get a smooth cream, then add the lemon zest and the 3 yolks and mix.

Add the sieved flour and yeast and wrap. On the other hand, beat the clears into castle and add them to the previous mixture, stirring carefully in movements from the bottom up. Finally, add the raspberry jam and mix slightly to get a marbled effect.

Fit a form, like English cake (standard size), with butter, sprinkle it with flour, pour in the previous mixture, smooth and bake it, preheated at 180°C for about 40 minutes. Stick with a toothpick to check the cooking, remove and let it cool down before unshattering.

english-trifle-to-die-for.name: English Trifle To Die For
instructions: Spread a little jam on each piece of cake and place in the bottom of a large glass bowl. Sprinkle raspberries over cake.

Heat 10 fl. oz. cream in a medium saucepan over medium heat. While the cream is heating, beat the egg yolks with the sugar until pale yellow and smooth. Strain yolk mixture into a clean bowl. Pour hot cream into egg yolks and stir vigorously. Return mixture to pan over low heat and cook, stirring, until thick enough to coat the back of a metal spoon. Remove from heat and allow to cool.

While custard is cooling, whip 10 fl oz. cream until soft peaks form. Place almonds on a baking sheet and toast, in a 300 degree oven or toaster oven, stirring frequently, until golden, 2 to 10 minutes.
Spread cooled custard over cake in bowl. Top with whipped cream and toasted almonds. Chill 2 hours before serving.
